answer:
While cleaning R2-D2, Luke accidentally triggered part of Leia's holographic message, in which she requested help from Obi-Wan Kenobi. This led Luke to seek out Ben Kenobi, who revealed himself as Obi-Wan. The message ultimately set the events of the story in motion.  

\boxed{\text{While cleaning R2-D2, Luke accidentally triggered part of Leia's holographic message requesting help from Obi-Wan Kenobi.}}
